Dashboard Archive: 2026-03-02 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Long-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns from 1 month to 10 years, with relative performance vs SPY over 1y/5y/10y. Same scoring engine as the short-term ranker but optimized for longer investment horizons and secular trends.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: Momentum Ranker Long Today's data shows two exceptional long-term performers dominating the rankings. BVN (Bolivian mining company) ranks #1 with a score of 94.1, displaying extraordinary 10-year returns of 688.72% and strong momentum across all timeframes, though its 0.71 correlation with gold (IAU) indicates it's primarily a commodity play rather than secular growth. AGI (a smaller-cap ticker) follows with even more extreme long-term performance—1207.8% over 10 years—and dramatically outperformed SPY by 954.48% over the same period, suggesting it capitalized on a specific secular trend that SPY exposure missed. Both tickers pass all four ratio thresholds and trade above their 30/50/100/200-day moving averages, signaling sustained uptrends rather than sharp reversals. The contrast between them is instructive: BVN's gains are tied to commodity cycles and inflation, while AGI's outperformance suggests exposure to a structural winner over the past decade. Neither ticker shows signs of momentum deterioration, though investors should note that past decade performance reflects very different market conditions than today.
For educational and informational purposes only. Not financial advice. Past performance does not guarantee future results.
